name: Star Map 25 — Buildings
description: Buildings users can place on planets in mapped systems. Each generates game_points over time (buildup). min_level: system level required. daily_reset_bonus: 2x points for 12h after daily reset (must-have).

buildings.name: Outpost
buildings.description: Forward base. Generates 1 game_point per day.

buildings.name: Listening Post
buildings.description: Intel relay. Generates 2 game_points per day.

buildings.name: Barracks
buildings.description: Garrison quarters. Generates 2 game_points per day.

buildings.name: Forge Shrine
buildings.description: Mechanicus outpost. Generates 3 game_points per day on Forge Worlds.

buildings.name: Naval Dock
buildings.description: Fleet anchorage. Generates 3 game_points per day on fortress/naval worlds.

buildings.name: Sanctum
buildings.description: Inquisition cell. Generates 4 game_points per day; requires life-bearing world.

buildings.name: Orbital Fortress
buildings.description: Heavy bastion. 5 game_points per day. Daily reset: 2x for 12h (must-have).

buildings.name: Cathedral
buildings.description: Imperial shrine. 6 game_points per day. Daily reset: 2x for 12h.

buildings.name: Primarch's Gate
buildings.description: Supreme structure. 8 game_points per day. Daily reset: 2x for 12h (must-have).
